LanguageData.VCE_HotSauce.description: Create hot sauce from jalapenos. It still bites hard enough to make the eyes water while fitting better into wasteland cooking.
LanguageData.VCE_InsectJellyPreserves.label: make ant preserves
LanguageData.VCE_Ketchup.description: Create ketchup from tatos. A thick sauce built from stewed wasteland tomatoes with the same sweet tang diners expect.
